title: Hanwha Ocean shares sink 23% as it loses bid to build Canada's next fleet of submarines
summary_full: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines.
summary_public: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney announced Monday that Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier for delivering the submarines.

DE.label: neutral
DE.evidence: Germany's Thyssenkrupp Marine Systems would be the preferred supplier
